info.description: E-commerce backend. Money is always in minor units: a price_cents of 1999 means $19.99.
info.title: go-ecommerce API

post.description: Exchanges email and password for an access/refresh token pair.

400.description: Validation failed

post.description: Revokes a refresh token. Succeeds even if the token is already gone, since the caller's intent is satisfied either way.

400.description: Validation failed

get.description: Returns the authenticated user. Identical to /users/profile.

404.description: Account no longer exists or is deactivated

post.description: Exchanges a refresh token for a new pair. The presented token is revoked, so each refresh token works once. Replaying a used token revokes every session for that user.

400.description: Validation failed

401.description: Invalid, expired, or already-used refresh token

post.description: Creates a customer account and returns an initial token pair. The role is always "customer"; it cannot be set by the caller.

400.description: Validation failed, or the email is unavailable

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's cart, priced from the products' current prices. A user who has never had a cart gets an empty one rather than a 404.

post.description: Adds a product, or increases the quantity already in the cart. The cart is not a reservation — stock is only held once the order is placed — but a quantity beyond what is in stock is refused here rather than at checkout.
post.summary: Add an item to your cart

400.description: Validation failed, or the product is not on sale

put.description: Replaces the quantity of one line. To remove it, use DELETE — a quantity of zero is refused.
put.summary: Set the quantity of a cart item

400.description: Validation failed, or the product is not on sale

404.description: No such item in your cart

delete.summary: Remove an item from your cart

400.description: The id is not a number

404.description: No such item in your cart

get.description: Public. Returns the active categories, ordered by name.

post.description: Admin only. The category is created active.

400.description: Validation failed

put.description: Admin only. Omitting is_active leaves it unchanged.

400.description: Validation failed, or the id is not a number

delete.description: Admin only. A category that still has products is refused; deactivate it instead, or move the products first.

400.description: The id is not a number

get.description: Returns a page of your own orders, newest first.

400.description: Invalid page or limit

post.description: Turns your cart into an order: stock comes down, the prices you pay are recorded on the order, and the cart is emptied. All of it happens together or not at all. Fails if any line is out of stock or no longer on sale.

400.description: The cart is empty, or a product is no longer on sale

404.description: A product in the cart no longer exists

409.description: Not enough stock for one of the lines

get.description: Returns an order you placed. Someone else's order id reads as not found.

400.description: The id is not a number

get.description: Public. Returns a page of active products, newest first, with their category and images.

400.description: Invalid page or limit

post.description: Admin only. The product is created active. Prices are in minor units: 1999 means $19.99.

400.description: Validation failed, or the category does not exist

409.description: The SKU is already in use

get.description: Public. An inactive product is reported as not found.

400.description: The id is not a number

404.description: No such product, or it is not on sale

put.description: Admin only. The SKU cannot be changed. Omitting is_active leaves it unchanged.

400.description: Validation failed, or the category does not exist

delete.description: Admin only. The product is soft-deleted and its SKU becomes available again.

400.description: The id is not a number

post.description: Admin only. Multipart upload of an image file. The file is identified by its contents, not its name; jpeg, png, gif, and webp are accepted. The first image a product gets becomes its primary one.

400.description: No file, or it is not an image we accept

get.description: Returns the authenticated user. Identical to /auth/me.

404.description: Account no longer exists or is deactivated

put.description: Replaces your name and phone. Role, email, and status are not editable here.

400.description: Validation failed

404.description: Account no longer exists or is deactivated

expires_in.description:
ExpiresIn is the access token's lifetime in seconds, so a client need
not decode the token to schedule a refresh.

quantity.description: Quantity and the price paid at the time of purchase.

created_at.description:
A real timestamp, not a preformatted string: clients localise it
themselves, and encoding/json already emits RFC 3339.

category.description:
Pointer and omitempty: an unloaded relation is absent rather than an
object full of zero values that a client cannot tell from real data.

is_active.description:
A pointer so an omitted field is distinguishable from false: without
it, every update would silently deactivate the category.

BearerAuth.description: Access token from /auth/login, sent as "Bearer <token>". A refresh token is rejected here.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
